description_long: This serving tray features a rectangular, slightly rounded brown base with a smooth surface, supporting a coordinated meal set. On the tray, there is a light blue plate holding a serving of white rice topped with several slices of pale, boneless chicken breast, accompanied by a rectangular piece of yellow butter or tofu. To the side, a matching blue bowl contains a light-colored soup garnished with green herbs. Two small round condiment dishes, one with a dark sauce and the other with a red sauce, are placed near the plate. A set of blue-handled cutlery, including a fork and spoon, is neatly arranged beside the plate. The overall presentation is clean and organized, with all items color-coordinated and symmetrically placed.
description: A brown rectangular serving tray holds a blue plate with sliced chicken and rice, a bowl of soup, two condiment dishes, and blue-handled cutlery, all neatly arranged.
description_view_0: The tray is viewed from the side, showing the plate of chicken and rice, soup bowl, condiments, and cutlery clearly laid out with the cutlery on the left.
description_view_1: This front-facing view centers the plate and soup bowl, with the cutlery at the back and all food items visible from above.
description_view_2: The tray is seen from the opposite side, with the cutlery now on the right and the soup bowl and condiments on the left.
description_view_3: A rear view with the cutlery in the foreground, plate and food in the center, and soup bowl and condiments at the back.
attribute_rim_design: The tray has a slightly raised, rounded rim approximately 1 cm high and 0.5 cm thick, with a smooth, continuous edge and no decorative features.
attribute_reflective_properties: The tray and dishware surfaces appear smooth and semi-matte with low gloss, showing minimal highlights and no strong reflections. The metal cutlery is slightly more reflective, with subtle gleams.
